get_third_friday_dates: generate the third Friday dates for the next 6 months in YYYYMMDD format
utc: get the current UTC datetime as a timezone-aware datetime object
naive: get the current UTC datetime as a timezone-naive datetime object
get_utc_str: get the current UTC datetime formatted as a YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS string
review_date_module: review the date module functions for UTC and naive datetime utilities
